title: Fees collection - Canada.ca
content:
This section contains policy, procedures and guidance used by IRCC staff. It is posted on the department’s website as a courtesy to stakeholders.
CIC is changing the way operational guidance is provided. Learn how to navigate the new format.
Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada charges fees to partially recover the cost of providing some services to the public.
Processing fees apply to nationals of all countries except where government policy or international practice specifically exempts certain cases. These charges apply to most services.
Payment options and exemptions.
Circumstances for refunds
Unique procedures related to missions
